prompt: Ping me if our checkout error rate climbs above 5%.
note: full chain: an alert fires on a metric, a metric rolls up an event — so instrument the event, define the metric, then create the alert

prompt: Mute the signup-conversion alert for now.
Bump the checkout error-rate alert to fire at 10% instead.
note: retune an existing rule's threshold — update, not a new rule

prompt: What alerts do we have set up?
note: read-only listing must not touch any rule
